title: Implement personal.files and personal.ssh packs
description: Create internal/packs/personal/files.go (0 safe, 5 destructive using AnyName matcher, tiered severity for delete/overwrite/access) and ssh.go (2 safe, 2 destructive). All path regex patterns (personalPathRe, sshPrivateKeyRe, etc). personalPathVariants() test helper. Tests for all path forms (tilde, HOME, /Users, /home, /root), near-miss cases, cross-pack interaction with core.filesystem. Golden files (~40 entries).

comments.author: Danny Cosson
comments.text: Implementation complete (7ce33f1). personal.files: 5 destructive patterns (Critical→Medium), command-agnostic AnyName+ArgContentRegex, path regex covers all 6 forms. personal.ssh: 2 safe (pub keys, config read) + 2 destructive (dir ops Critical, private key High). Adapted sshPrivateKeyRe for Go RE2 (no negative lookahead — D2 uses Not(sshPublicKeyRe) instead). 120+ test cases, 31 golden entries. All tests pass. Submitting for review.
